title: Control file lint_off can be turned back on by source metacomment

features.name: verilator lint_off with -file flag in control file
features.description: Code should include a verilator control file (.vlt) with lint_off directive using -file flag to target a specific source file

features.name: inline lint_off and lint_on metacomments in source
features.description: Code should include inline verilator lint_off and lint_on metacomments in source code following a control file lint_off directive
